channel.title: The Diary of a dreamer
channel.description: Recent content on The Diary of a dreamer

item.title: Introduction to Groovy
item.author: brian mituka
item.content:
Groovy is a dynamic loosely typed language for the JVM. Basically, groovy is Java without the boilerplate Groovy is optionally static. types are inferred based on the variable values type

Groovy is a dynamic loosely typed language for the JVM. Basically, groovy is Java without the boilerplate Groovy is optionally static. types are inferred based on the variable values type

Groovy is a dynamic loosely typed language for the JVM. Basically, groovy is Java without the boilerplate Groovy is optionally static. types are inferred based on the variable values type

item.title: Hello
item.author: brian mituka
item.content: # I am not brian nitletone this is my blog. You can also call me mots
